title: Senior Frontend Developer
description:
We are looking for a talented Senior Frontend Developer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining high-quality web applications using React and TypeScript. You'll work closely with our design and backend teams to deliver exceptional user experiences.

As a Senior Frontend Developer, you will lead technical decisions, mentor junior developers, and contribute to our product architecture. You'll have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects for clients across various industries.

We offer a collaborative work environment, competitive compensation, and opportunities for professional growth.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in frontend development
Strong proficiency in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS

title: Product Manager
description:
FinEdge Corp is seeking a driven Product Manager to lead our fintech product suite. You will own the product roadmap, collaborate with engineering and design teams, and ensure we deliver value to our customers.

You'll be responsible for gathering user insights, defining product vision, and translating business requirements into actionable features. This is an exciting opportunity to shape a product used by thousands of users daily.

Join our fast-paced team and help us redefine financial services in the region.
requirements: Experience in fintech or B2B SaaS products
Strong analytical and data-driven decision making

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
CreativeHub Agency is looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our design team. You'll craft beautiful, intuitive interfaces for web and mobile applications across a diverse range of industries.

You will work directly with clients and developers to translate ideas into polished user experiences. Your work will impact products used by millions of people.

We're a remote-first company with a strong design culture and regular design critiques.
requirements: Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
Strong portfolio showcasing web and mobile designs
Understanding of user research and usability testing
Knowledge of design systems and component libraries
Ability to communicate design decisions effectively

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description:
CloudStack Ltd is looking for a Backend Engineer with strong Node.js expertise to build scalable microservices. You'll be working on cloud-native applications serving millions of requests per day.

You'll design and implement RESTful APIs, optimize database queries, and contribute to our DevOps practices. This role requires someone comfortable with high-traffic systems and distributed architectures.

You'll work in a team of talented engineers with the freedom to make architectural decisions.
requirements: Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL and Redis
Familiarity with AWS or GCP cloud services

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
GrowthBox is hiring a Digital Marketing Specialist to drive our online presence and growth campaigns. You'll manage SEO, SEM, social media, and email marketing efforts to acquire and retain customers.

This is a great opportunity for someone eager to learn and grow in a data-driven marketing environment. You'll have full ownership of campaigns and see direct impact on business results.
requirements: Knowledge of Google Ads and Meta Ads
Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field

title: Data Scientist
description:
InsightAI is seeking a Data Scientist to build machine learning models that power our AI-driven analytics platform. You'll work with large datasets, develop predictive models, and present insights to stakeholders.

You'll collaborate with engineers to deploy models to production and continuously improve model performance. This role sits at the intersection of research and engineering.
requirements: 3+ years of data science or ML engineering experience
Proficiency in Python and key ML libraries (scikit-learn, TensorFlow)
Experience with data wrangling and visualization
Experience with SQL and big data tools

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
InfraBase is looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure and improve our deployment pipelines. You'll work with developers to automate testing, deployment, and monitoring of our systems.

You'll own our Kubernetes clusters, implement infrastructure as code, and ensure high availability of our services. This is a fully remote role with flexible working hours.
requirements: Expert knowledge of Kubernetes and Docker

title: Sales Executive
description:
TradeLink is looking for a motivated Sales Executive to join our B2B sales team. You'll be responsible for acquiring new clients, managing relationships, and hitting monthly revenue targets.

You'll work with a warm pipeline of leads and have the tools and support you need to succeed. Commission structure is highly competitive with uncapped earning potential.
requirements: Proven track record of hitting sales targets

title: Android Developer
description:
MobileFirst is seeking an Android Developer to build and maintain our consumer mobile apps. You'll work on exciting features, improve app performance, and collaborate with designers to deliver great user experiences.

Our apps have over 500k downloads and are growing rapidly. You'll have real ownership over key features and direct impact on user satisfaction.
requirements: Strong knowledge of Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
Experience with REST APIs and Firebase
Understanding of Android architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture)

title: HR Business Partner
description:
PeopleFirst is hiring an HR Business Partner to support our rapidly growing organization. You'll partner with department leaders to drive talent acquisition, employee development, and culture initiatives.

This role requires someone who is both strategic and hands-on, comfortable working with data to inform people decisions and building trusted relationships across the business.
requirements: Experience as an HRBP or similar strategic HR role
Strong knowledge of Egyptian labor law
Bachelor's degree in HR or Business Administration

title: Frontend Developer (Angular)
description:
PixelCraft is looking for an Angular developer with a passion for building great UIs. You'll work on an enterprise SaaS platform used by hundreds of businesses.

You'll be responsible for implementing features, improving performance, and ensuring code quality. We use the latest Angular features and maintain a strong engineering culture.
requirements: Knowledge of testing with Jasmine and Karma

title: Content Writer
description:
MediaSphere is hiring a Content Writer to create engaging articles, blog posts, and social media content. You'll research industry topics and produce high-quality content that drives traffic and builds brand authority.

This is a part-time remote role, perfect for someone with a strong writing voice and interest in technology and business topics.
requirements: Excellent written Arabic and English skills
Ability to research and simplify complex topics
